infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Remy uses your camera to scan ingredients and support cooking guidance.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Remy uses your microphone to record audio with cooking videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Remy lets you attach kitchen photos from your library.
